body.zh-CN: 公开列表从后端接口读取，新增和上传操作需要 token。
body.en-US: Public lists load from the backend API. Create and upload actions require a token.

body.zh-CN: 页面统一在 pageRegistry 中注册，导航和路由会自动读取这份配置。
body.en-US: Pages are registered in pageRegistry, and navigation plus routes are generated from that config.

body.zh-CN: 皮肤使用 CSS 变量驱动，Tailwind 工具类会自动套用当前主题色。
body.en-US: Skins are driven by CSS variables, so Tailwind utilities automatically follow the active theme.
